crime.value: Aircraft hijacking with passengers and crew held hostage
crime.quote: There were people of different religions and sects in the high jacked flight.

victim.value: Passengers and crew of hijacked flight, including people of different religions and sects
victim.quote: There were people of different religions and sects in the high jacked flight.

closed_world.quote: All the earthly emotions, inner feelings, debates and discussions, and reactions of the passengers on board

investigator.value: Dr. Jinnah and Prof. Gandhi (mass communication professor/journalist)
investigator.quote: the fearless and confident answers of Dr. Jinnah, were kept on live, connected to a popular English channel by Prof. Gandhi

red_herring.value: Religious and scientific debates used as misdirection from the core mystery of proving life after death
red_herring.quote: So also the educated, who totally depended on science couldn't believe it.

clue_fairness.value: Scientific explanations about DNA and Panchaboothas provided to reader alongside the narrative
clue_fairness.quote: Gene families: A gene family is a group of genes that share important characteristics.

social_world.value: Religious divisions and hierarchy between passengers of different faiths on hijacked flight
social_world.quote: There were people of different religions and sects in the high jacked flight.

reveal_mechanic.value: Scientific proof through DNA and soul travel faster than any object in universe
reveal_mechanic.quote: A poor doctor who challenged to prove that the soul would travel much faster than any object

media_and_audience.value: Live broadcast to English channel making the entire world witness the flight events
media_and_audience.quote: kept on live, connected to a popular English channel by Prof. Gandhi
